motto: Three steps forward, two steps back.
question: Can the apparatus be modified to allow the next step in discovery without admitting unearned transports?
answer: Yes. Modify the discovery layer, not the G900 body or admission ledger.

statuses.meaning: A candidate is visible to the search apparatus.
A candidate passes the current gate-readiness qualifier.
A proposed rule, selector, or choice function nominates candidates for further study.
A choice hypothesis has survived provenance and coupling tests enough to ask for admission review.
statuses.requires: construction provenance plus coupling law plus receipt

statuses.meaning: A permission channel has been admitted by the existing admission ledger.
statuses.guardrail: only the admission ledger grants this status

statuses.meaning: An information transport has been admitted by the existing transport ledger.
statuses.guardrail: only the transport ledger grants this status

rules.forbidden: add vertices, add edges, mutate carrier body
rules.reason: Discovery must not alter the theorem object.

rules.rule: Keep the admitted ledger fixed unless a new explicit admission receipt is created.
Allow a quarantine discovery layer over the 71 gate-ready candidates.
rules.reason: The frontier needs a place to be studied without being admitted.

rules.rule: Allow expanded construction fields for source, carrier, endpoint, role, phase, anchor, package, and support variables.
rules.forbidden: label-leaking selectors that merely rename the answer
rules.reason: A deeper coupling law may require variables not present in 020-026.

rules.rule: Require every choice function to declare whether it is native, stable, and non-label-leaking.
rules.forbidden: choice by preference, aesthetics, or post-hoc naming
rules.reason: Choice must become law before admission can expand.

rules.rule: Do not admit a broader transport family merely because all deferred candidates are gate-ready.

next_work.name: frontier_choice_variable_inventory
next_work.purpose: Inventory extra construction variables available for the 71 frontier candidates.

next_work.name: frontier_choice_function_search
next_work.purpose: Search for native, stable, non-label-leaking choice functions over the quarantined frontier.

next_work.name: frontier_choice_function_stress_test
next_work.purpose: Stress-test any proposed choice function against leakage, shuffling, and construction provenance.

next_work.name: admission_review_only_if_choice_becomes_law
next_work.purpose: Ask whether a surviving choice law should be promoted to an admission candidate.

interpretation.main: The next discovery apparatus is a quarantine layer for choice hypotheses over the frontier.
interpretation.what_changes: The lens and discovery language expand.
interpretation.what_does_not_change: The G900 body, admitted ledger, and admission rule remain locked.
interpretation.why: This lets the research continue without confusing possible choice laws with admitted permission.

keeper: Modify the lens, not the body. Expand discovery, not admission.
